name: Salted Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch almonds by soaking them in boiling water for a few minutes. Remove the skins and pat dry on paper towels.
2. Place the almonds in a bowl and pour oil over them to coat evenly.
3. Let stand for 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Pour the almonds onto a jelly-roll baking sheet with sides.
5. Sprinkle generously with salt.
6. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
7. Roast the almonds, watching closely until they are lightly browned.
8. Remove from the oven; the nuts will continue to roast even after removal, so do not leave them in until dark or they may become too dark.
9. Spread the almonds on paper towels and salt again.
10. Let cool before storing in airtight containers to keep fresh.
